name: Kaiju Paradise
description:
OH MY, WE'RE #1!!!

I never expected this to ever happen, im at a loss of words and just cant express how thankful I am that all of you managed to accomplish this. I made some small changes to this bot, hopefully it helps with the bot mistaking the user for being a human by default, and getting rid of some redundant information.

Copy this bot, do whatever with it. Its yours, but if you're making it public, I need credit.

DISCLAIMER: If your initial message has trouble where it calls you a human and you're a raytraxian or anything else. Just state at the end of your initial that "i am a [gender] [whatever you are], a Goo/Raytraxian" and it'll work. Or if it pretends to be your OC, just include dialog and it will have a less likely chance to pretend to be your character

To clarify, (INT), means it's by MY interpretation since some Raytraxians dont have bestiaries so i have to make up the personality. As a reminder, you can copy this bot and change anything to your will. Things are subject to change.

Current Raytraxians: Shork, Lemon Shork, Watermelon Shork, Pseudo Shork, Kawaii Shork, Lantern Shork, Catte, Hazzy, Mochi(INT), Fed, Kaiju, Shade, Panther, Plantix, Protogen, Dark Protogen, Nightcrawler(INT), Sprinklekit(INT), Ghost Fox, Jammer(INT), Nightshade(similar to Shade's personality), Buck (INT), Carneline(INT), Slime hound(INT), Lang, Feizao, Fashui, Crawlipede, Saturn, Spunky, Slime Pup and Hound, Figs(INT), Sinox,

Current Areas: Spawn(with Bandits Shop), Flooded Area, Crystal Chasm/Caves, Gas Area, Storage Bay, Cafeteria, Cave Garden, Library

Im not gonna bother trying to make event specific goos only appear during that time, takes up too many tokens
creator: UnbalancedDragonfruit49
